sentences.sentence: First, tape your paper to the board.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (tape, board)

sentences.sentence: Next, fill a jar with water.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (jar, water)

sentences.sentence: Then, dampen the surface evenly.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (-mp in dampen), reduced syllables (evenly)

sentences.sentence: Mix small amounts of pigment for our first wash.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nts in amounts), reduced function words (for our)

sentences.sentence: Brush the strokes lightly across the damp paper.
sentences.structure: imperative with adverbial and prepositional phrase
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (str- in strokes), reduced syllables (lightly)

sentences.sentence: Add darker tints once the surface feels comfortable to touch.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-lts in tints), reduced syllables (comfortable)

sentences.sentence: Lastly, when your painting is fully dry, peel the tape away and sign the bottom corner.
sentences.structure: fronted Lastly clause with compound finish
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundaries (painting_is), reduced function words in rapid sequence

sentences.sentence: Paint supplies are stocked in this aisle.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nts in paint), word-final stocked

sentences.sentence: Power tools sit near the front counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (front counter), word-final tools

sentences.sentence: Replacement bolts and screws are sorted by size.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-lts in bolts, scr- in screws)

sentences.sentence: We can cut lumber to your length at the work bench.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (work bench), reduced function words (to your)

sentences.sentence: Spare keys are duplicated quickly at the side desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (sp- in spare), reduced syllables (duplicated, quickly)

sentences.sentence: Garden hoses and sprinklers are displayed along the far wall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (spr- in sprinklers), compound noun stress (garden hoses)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot locate an item on the shelves, check the store directory posted by the entrance.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across long sentence, linked speech (locate_an, posted_by)

sentences.sentence: Course textbooks are shelved by department.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-rs in textbooks), word-final shelved

sentences.sentence: Used copies are marked automatically with a yellow sticker.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables (automatically), consonant clusters (-pies, -ker)

sentences.sentence: We can order any title that is currently out of stock.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-ck in stock), reduced syllables (currently)

sentences.sentence: Notebooks and supplies are restocked every Wednesday morning.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables (Wednesday), consonant clusters (-cks, -pl-)

sentences.sentence: Rental returns are accepted at the back counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (back counter), consonant clusters (-nts in returns)

sentences.sentence: Your student discount applies to most clothing and gift items.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (student discount), consonant clusters (-nts, -ft)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot find your required edition, check the printed list taped beside the register.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation (rising if-clause, falling main), linked speech (find_your)
